catalog.name: Platform open private funders - vuelta 1
catalog.purpose: Initial non-scraping catalogue of official private-open funder sources for third-sector funding intelligence.
rules: Use only official funder pages or official documents.
Do not include tenant-private emails, PDFs, or relationship-based invitations.
Treat closed but recurring calls as monitorable sources, not active opportunities.
Every accepted source must support versioning, deadline watch, criteria watch, and tenant impact alerts before operational use.

deep_scan_policy.minimum_depth: same-origin official pages to depth 2 before declaring bases missing

manual_fallback.activation_rule: manual contribution can create a review candidate, never an auto-approved tenant alert

confidence_levels.high: Curated official basis URL or exact official document with source-specific token match.
confidence_levels.medium: Same-origin official page/PDF with enough call, deadline or source-token evidence for human review.
confidence_levels.low: Possible evidence, but likely index, neighboring call, news item, or insufficiently matched document.

human_verification_url_required_when: only homepage or news item was found
basis_verification.curated_basis_priority: When a human-reviewed source supplies basis_url and navigation_path, that final document overrides other same-domain PDFs discovered during crawling.
basis_verification.discarded: Not relevant, duplicate, insufficient evidence, blocked without manual support, or not a grant/funding line.
basis_verification.archived: Previously live or evidence-backed candidate that is closed, resolved, expired, or kept for historical traceability.

sources.name: Fundacion la Caixa - Convocatorias de Proyectos Sociales
sources.monitoring_cadence: daily while any territory is open, weekly otherwise
sources.initial_action: Monitor territory map and create one canonical opportunity per territory when dates and bases are explicit.

sources.name: Fundacion la Caixa - Convocatoria Social Comunitat Valenciana 2026

status_facts.opening: 24 de febrero de 2026, a las 12 h
status_facts.closing: 26 de marzo de 2026, a las 17 h

navigation_path.label: Ficha territorial con estado y fechas clave
Documentacion de interes > Bases de la convocatoria

sources.monitoring_cadence: weekly until resolution, monthly until next edition
sources.initial_action: Archive as closed with bases evidence; monitor for resolution and next territorial edition.

sources.name: Fundacion Mutua Madrilena - Ayudas a Proyectos de Accion Social
sources.deadline_text: 2025 annual call closed; monitor for next edition
sources.monitoring_cadence: weekly, daily after annual call announcement
sources.initial_action: Keep as high-priority recurrent source; alert tenants only when a new edition opens.

sources.name: Fundacion MAPFRE - Ayudas a Proyectos Sociales
sources.deadline_text: Line-specific; one employment-related call indicates 2026-09-30 or until total grants are awarded
sources.initial_action: Split by line before ingestion because MAPFRE groups several calls under one funder area.

sources.name: Fundacion Bancaja - CaixaBank Capaces 2026
sources.deadline_text: Estado: agotado plazo; solicitudes hasta 2026-05-20; seleccion prevista finales de junio; ayuda maxima 20.000 EUR

navigation_path.label: Ficha oficial con estado, plazo, importe y documentos

sources.monitoring_cadence: weekly until selection, monthly until next edition
sources.initial_action: Archive as closed with bases evidence; monitor for selected projects or next edition.

sources.name: Fundacion Ibercaja - Convocatorias
sources.deadline_text: Multiple calls; collaboration requests open 2026-01-01 to 2026-12-31
sources.monitoring_cadence: daily for open calls, weekly for call list
sources.initial_action: Use the call-list page as index and create child opportunities per call.

sources.name: Fundacion ONCE - Convocatoria general de proyectos 2026
sources.deadline_text: 2026-01-26 to 2026-06-30 12:00 peninsular time; closed as of 2026-07-06
sources.monitoring_cadence: weekly for resolution or next call
sources.initial_action: Archive as closed for 2026; monitor for resolution or next edition before alerting tenants.

sources.name: Fundacion ONCE - Convocatoria Empleo Publico 2026
sources.initial_action: Normalize as separate opportunity from the ONCE general call.

sources.name: Fundacion Iberdrola Espana - Programa Social
sources.initial_action: High relevance for employment and vulnerable collectives; monitor for deadline or bases updates.

sources.name: Fundacion Banco Santander - Santander Ayuda
sources.initial_action: Keep as recurring source; do not show as live candidate until next call opens.

sources.name: Fundacion Banco Santander - Convocatorias
sources.monitoring_cadence: weekly, daily when action-social call appears
sources.initial_action: Use as parent index for Santander private-open opportunities.

sources.name: Fundacion Botin - Talento Solidario
sources.initial_action: Keep as capacity-building opportunity, not ordinary project grant.

sources.name: Fundacion Orange - Soluciones Digitales para autismo
sources.deadline_text: Requires page-specific review for current edition

sources.name: Fundacion Repsol - Fondo de Emprendedores
sources.initial_action: Lower priority for classic NGOs; useful for social enterprise or energy-transition pilots.

sources.name: Ford Espana - Construyendo Juntos
